title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Honeywell India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Honeywell India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Honeywell India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Honeywell India:
Honeywell India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India!
